meta.title: Kitsune Cover — 限量聯名策展

customStudio.metaDescription: 手機殼客製：印刷、透明款、鏡頭周邊設計、支架／指環、MagSafe 相容等，附參考圖。
customStudio.lead: 保護殼不只是護具。在聯名圖稿與個人創作之間，客製讓手機變成可攜帶的海報。
customStudio.intro: 像 CASETiFY 這類品牌把模組化流程做主流：上傳圖、選殼型，再疊加鏡頭環、掛繩或 MagSafe 配件。好的成品像編輯排版，而不是貼紙拼貼。

types.title: 印刷與表面
types.body: 滿版類 UV 風印刷，亮面或霧面保護層——角落撞擊也不容易龜裂或剝落。

types.title: 透明與霧染底殼
types.body: 水晶透明露出機身色，或煙霧、霧面降低指紋與反光。

types.title: 鏡頭島視覺
types.body: 在鏡頭模組周圍加入線條、字樣與框線，讓鏡頭區像設計過的畫框。

types.title: 支架與握持配件
types.body: 指環、摺疊支架、卡夾等，可裝在相容殼上，方便單手與旅行。

types.title: MagSafe 對位
types.body: 磁吸位置對應充電器與卡包——定稿前確認圖稿不會干擾吸附手感。

customStudio.galleryLead: 三種常見方向：強烈印刷、克制的透明款、配件感重的配置。

gallery.alt: 印有大膽圖像的手機殼
gallery.caption: 滿版印刷——圖像主導，硬體退後。
透明底——機身顏色成為配色的一部分。
鏡頭區當排版格線——線條呼應鏡頭排列。

customStudio.ctaHint: 合作連結——由此進入客製可支持本站策展內容。

dropsSection.lead: Each card works like an editorial product tile: clear drop status, partner-out links, and just enough context to feel collectible instead of disposable.

storiesSection.lead: The site wins not by saying “buy this,” but by explaining why a drop matters — design cues, franchise DNA, and collector appeal across markets.

shopGuide.lead: Kitsune Cover should present itself as a curated catalog for limited collab phone cases and accessories. Affiliate disclosure, brand distance, and editorial clarity should stay visible everywhere.

cards.title: Curated collab catalog
cards.body: Use language like showcase, selection, collector guide, and featured drop. Avoid posing as an official franchise store or a manufacturer.

cards.title: Partner-linked access
cards.body: Buttons should lead to partner merchants. Keep disclosure clean and plain. The value is curation, context, and visual selection — not pretending to hold inventory.

cards.title: Neo-pop editorial
cards.body: Dark premium base, hard black borders, loud accent stickers, oversized type, and modular blocks. That keeps it collectible instead of turning into a cheap anime shop.

story.jpVertical: 制作について · drop culture · tokyo street

footer.stack: Next.js · Tailwind · next-intl · 編輯式 DROP
footer.payLine: Line Pay · Apple Pay · Kakao Pay · Shop Pay

evangelion.sub: A limited EVANGELION case drop built for fans of bold design, collector energy, and iconic mecha visuals. Rare collab pieces, sharp detailing, and a release made to stand out.
evangelion.meta: ONLY 48 / 500 LEFT · JP / KR / TW / US
evangelion.heroImageAlt: EVANGELION × CASETiFY limited phone case — Rei Ayanami artwork
evangelion.label: Evangelion
evangelion.storyBody: Built on industrial caution-strip energy and sleek sci-fi tension, Evangelion collabs work when they feel engineered — not cutesy. The right case design should echo control panels, warning graphics, and emotional severity.

helloKitty.heroHeadphonesAlt: TAKASHI MURAKAMI × CASETiFY 聯名耳罩式耳機，粉紅圓形耳蓋
helloKitty.sub: TAKASHI MURAKAMI x CASETiFY: KAIKAI AND KIKI transforms Murakami’s iconic character duo into bold, collectible tech accessories. Launched on July 17, 2025, the collection captures the defining contrast of the artist’s world: Kaikai’s bright, cheerful energy, Kiki’s mischievous edge, and the signature Superflat aesthetic that made Murakami a global name. More than just a case, each piece feels like a small, everyday art object.
helloKitty.label: TAKASHI MURAKAMI
helloKitty.storyBody: Murakami’s Kaikai and Kiki translate naturally to tech: bold planes of color, character tension, and gallery-scale energy scaled into something you carry every day.

sailorMoon.heroTabletAlt: SUSAN FANG × CASETiFY 平板保護殼，薰衣草漸層與蝴蝶結
sailorMoon.sub: SUSAN FANG x CASETiFY: Infinity in Bloom brings Susan Fang’s dreamy, ethereal design language into everyday tech. Inspired by the symbolism of infinity and blooming beauty, the collection turns phone cases into delicate statement pieces where fashion, art, and function meet.
sailorMoon.label: SUSAN FANG
sailorMoon.storyBody: Fang’s language of light, layers, and infinity symbols reads like jewelry — perfect for a case that sits between runway and daily carry.

ghost.heroMacbookAlt: SSEBONG × CASETiFY MacBook 保護殼，鴨子插畫
ghost.sub: SSEBONG x CASETiFY turns everyday moods into playful tech accessories. Created with Seoul-based illustrator SSEBONG, the collection features lazy ducks, soft humor, and highly relatable designs inspired by comfort, low-energy days, and the small chaos of daily life. Cute, clever, and full of personality, it is a collab made for people who want their devices to feel a little more fun.
ghost.label: SSEBONG
ghost.storyBody: When illustration speaks in memes and rest, the case becomes a mood board — gentle color, loose line, and humor that lands without trying too hard.

doraemon.heroPhoneAlt: ONE PIECE × CASETiFY iPhone 保護殼，直式字樣
doraemon.sub: ONE PIECE x CASETiFY brings the world of adventure, pirates, and iconic anime symbolism into a collection of bold everyday tech accessories. Inspired by the energy of the Straw Hat crew, the mystery of Devil Fruits, and the instantly recognizable style of the series, this collaboration turns beloved elements from ONE PIECE into collectible designs that feel both expressive and functional. More than simple fan merchandise, it captures the spirit of freedom, loyalty, and the thrill of the journey that made ONE PIECE a global legend.
doraemon.label: ONE PIECE
doraemon.storyBody: Iconography from the series scales well to cases: bold silhouettes, emblematic marks, and color blocking that reads from across the room.

totoro.heroLogoAlt: Ann Marie Coolick × CASETiFY 手機殼，厚塗色彩
totoro.sub: Ann Marie Coolick brings her signature impasto florals to CASETiFY — transforming rich textures and blooming color into expressive, gallery-inspired phone cases. Each design captures the depth and movement of real paint, turning everyday tech into a piece of wearable art. From soft hydrangeas to bold, vibrant bouquets, this collection blends nature, color, and texture into something you don’t just see — you feel.
totoro.label: ANN MARIE COOLICK
totoro.storyBody: Thick brush energy and floral motion translate surprisingly well to print — the case becomes a canvas you carry, not a flat graphic.

tbd.heroPhoneAlt: 飛天小女警 × CASETiFY iPhone 保護殼，愛心絎縫
tbd.sub: Blossom, Bubbles, or Buttercup — choose the energy that defines you. This collection transforms your everyday tech into bold, character-driven statements inspired by the iconic trio. From vibrant colors to nostalgic graphics, each design reflects a distinct personality — whether you lead, shine, or break the rules. Customize your case and make it more than protection — make it yours. Because it’s not just a design. It’s your Powerpuff identity.
tbd.label: POWERPUFF GIRLS
tbd.storyBody: Three personalities, three palettes — the collab works when the graphic reads as character cosplay for your device: loud color blocks, attitude, and instant recognition.
